## Checklist

- [ ] `make fmtcheck vet build` pass
- [ ] `make lint` passes (or template changes don't touch shell/Dockerfile)
- [ ] No third-party Go dependency added (or discussed in an issue first)
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or `generated/` / `config/` contents committed
- [ ] Security-relevant changes keep the THREAT-MODEL.md invariants intact
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or the CLI surface changed
